storyboard.content: I have been finding it harder and harder to read small print and need to hold things further away to see them.
This has been slowly getting worse over the past year.
I have to squint to read anything up close.
My distance vision is fine and I do not have any headaches or eye pain.
It causes mild difficulty with everyday tasks like reading but is not painful.
I am a 46-year-old man with no other health conditions and I have never needed glasses before.
The problem is only with close-up reading, not with seeing things at a distance.
